original_snippet_context: Discussing the Quixadá dam and its perceived failure to reach full capacity.
relevant_quote: Não nos parece qne se deva conside rar perdida a somma gasta, jielo faclo de não ter ainda o açude attingido ao máximo do sen conteúdo de água, pre- visto e calculado.
justification: This statement discusses the cost and water level of the Quixadá dam, which, while potentially related to broader economic development and resource management relevant to the context of the Caixa de Conversão debates, doesn't express a view aligned with either the orthodox or expansionist monetary perspectives.
